title: Iran war revives unlikely Trump impeachment talk from Democrats
shortDescription: Congressional Democrats have mostly avoided seriously calling for Trump's impeachment since he returned to office. Then came the Iran war.

title: White House text of Melania Trump's statement denying Epstein links
shortDescription: Read the full transcript of first lady Melania Trump's statement of the late convicted sex offender Jeffrey Epstein.

title: Why impeaching Trump is a long shot
shortDescription: A Democratic lawmaker filed articles of impeachment against President Trump, though they are unlikely to succeed in a Republican-controlled Congress.

title: Melania Trump denies Epstein rumors
shortDescription: First lady Melania Trump held a press conference on April 9, 2026, to deny any ties to Jeffrey Epstein and Ghislaine Maxwell.

title: Melania Trump speaks out on Epstein, bashing 'lies' and 'false smears'
shortDescription: The first lady also said Epstein did not introduce her to her husband, President Donald Trump.

title: First Lady Melania Trump denies ties to Epstein
shortDescription: First Lady Melania Trump denied any ties to Jeffrey Epstein and Ghislaine Maxwell.

title: Even Republican leaders pushed back against Trump’s threats this week
shortDescription: According to legal experts, the intentional bombing of civilian infrastructure is considered a war crime by the Geneva Conventions.

title: SoCal sees protest over war in Iran day after ceasefire called
shortDescription: Protestors condemned the U.S.-Israel war in Iran at one of dozens of events planned nationwide.

title: Republicans block Democrat-proposed measure to end war against Iran
shortDescription: Republicans in the House of Representatives blocked Democrats from considering a measure to halt military hostilities in Iran.

title: Trump warns Iran of 'bigger' attacks if deal is not reached. Updates
shortDescription: It remains unclear whether the ceasefire will hold as Israel bombs Lebanon and Iran signals it will not abandon its ally.

title: Trump and Iran both claim ceasefire victory. Who does it really help?
shortDescription: Both sides claim victory amid disputes over key details.

title: Articles of impeachment filed against Trump. Why it's a longshot
shortDescription: Rep. John Larson has filed articles of impeachement against Trump in 2026, but they face a steep uphill battle in a Republican-controlled Congress.

title: Bill Gates latest to face congressional scrutiny in Epstein files
shortDescription: Tech billionaire Bill Gates is the latest high-profile name to testify before Congress about his connections to Jeffrey Epstein.

title: White House says Strait of Hormuz is not closed
shortDescription: Press Secretary Karoline Leavitt responded to a question about Iranian media reports that the Strait of Hormuz is closed, saying they are false.

title: White House: Lebanon ‘not included’ in ceasefire
shortDescription: The White House says Lebanon is not included in the current ceasefire deal, as Israeli airstrikes in the country killed at least 112 people.
